title: Custom Carpentry Kauai
metaTitle: Custom Carpentry Kauai | Built-ins, Trim & Finish Work | Ad Value Home Improvement
metaDescription: Skilled custom carpentry on Kauai. Built-in shelving, finish carpentry, door & window installation, flooring, trim, chicken coops, and unique woodworking. Free estimates.
pageTitle: Custom Carpentry & Finish Work on Kauai
subtitle: From fine finish carpentry to one-of-a-kind projects — we build it with skill and care.
imageAlt: Custom carpentry workspace with wood and precision tools
intro: Carpentry is at the heart of what we do at Ad Value Home Improvement. From the detailed finish work that makes a room look polished to custom built-ins that maximize your space — and even the unconventional projects like chicken coops, farm stands, and horse mounting blocks that Kauai's unique lifestyle calls for. If it involves wood and skill, we're in.

highlights.title: Master Finish Work
highlights.description: Crown molding, baseboards, casing, and trim installed with precision for a truly polished look.

highlights.title: Custom Built-ins
highlights.description: Built-in shelving, entertainment centers, mudroom benches, and closet systems fitted to your exact space.

highlights.title: Door & Window Pro
highlights.description: Precise installation of all door types, windows, and sliding doors — fitted properly so they function perfectly.

highlights.title: Unique Projects
highlights.description: Chicken coops, farm stands, horse mounting blocks — Kauai's lifestyle calls for creative carpentry and we're ready.

schemaDescription: Expert custom carpentry on Kauai. Built-ins, finish carpentry, flooring, doors, windows, trim, and unique woodworking projects.
